accountPanelServerProfile.description: Right click your account panel in the bottom left to view your profile in the current server (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

prioritizeServerProfile.description: Prioritize Server Profile when left clicking your account panel

alwaysAnimate.description: Animates anything that can be animated (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

icons.description: Always animate server icons, avatars, decor and more

appleMusicRichPresence.description: Discord rich presence for your Apple Music! (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

activityType.description:
Which type of activity

Values: 0 = Playing, 2 = Listening

statusDisplayType.description: Show the track / artist name in the member list

refreshInterval.description: The interval between activity refreshes (seconds) (restart required)

enableTimestamps.description: Whether or not to enable timestamps

enableButtons.description: Whether or not to enable buttons

largeTextString.description: Activity assets large text format string

smallTextString.description: Activity assets small text format string

betterGifAltText.description: Change GIF alt text from simply being 'GIF' to containing the gif tags / filename (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

betterNotesBox.description: Hide notes or disable spellcheck (Configure in settings!!) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

betterRoleContext.description: Adds options to copy role color / edit role / view role icon when right clicking roles in the user profile (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

roleIconFileFormat.description: File format to use when viewing role icons

betterRoleDot.description: Copy role colour on RoleDot (accessibility setting) click. Also allows using both RoleDot and coloured names simultaneously (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

bothStyles.description: Show both role dot and coloured names (restart required)

copyRoleColorInProfilePopout.description: Allow click on role dot in profile popout to copy role color (restart required)

betterSessions.description: Enhances the sessions (devices) menu. Allows you to view exact timestamps, give each session a custom name, and receive notifications about new sessions. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

backgroundCheck.description: Check for new sessions in the background, and display notifications when they are detected (restart required)

checkInterval.description: How often to check for new sessions in the background (if enabled), in minutes (restart required)

betterSettings.description: Enhances your settings-menu-opening experience (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

organizeMenu.description: Organizes the settings cog context menu into categories (restart required)

eagerLoad.description: Removes the loading delay when opening the menu for the first time (restart required)

betterUploadButton.description: Upload with a single click, open menu with right click (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

biggerStreamPreview.description: This plugin allows you to enlarge stream previews (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

ClearURLs.description: Automatically removes tracking elements from URLs you send (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

clientTheme.description: Recreation of the old client theme experiment. Add a color to your Discord client theme (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

colorSighted.description: Removes the colorblind-friendly icons from statuses, just like 2015-2017 Discord (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

consoleJanitor.description: Disables annoying console messages/errors (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

disableSpotifyLogger.description: Disable the Spotify logger, which leaks account information and access token (restart required)

whitelistedLoggers.description: Semicolon (;) separated list of loggers to allow even if others are hidden

consoleShortcuts.description: Adds shorter Aliases for many things on the window. Run `shortcutList` for a list. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

copyEmojiMarkdown.description: Allows you to copy emojis as formatted string (<:blobcatcozy:1026533070955872337>) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

copyUnicode.description: Copy the raw unicode character instead of :name: for default emojis (👽)

copyFileContents.description: Adds a button to text file attachments to copy their contents (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

copyStickerLinks.description: Adds the ability to copy & open Sticker links (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

CopyUserURLs.description: Adds a 'Copy User URL' option to the user context menu. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

crashHandler.description: Utility plugin for handling and possibly recovering from crashes without a restart (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

attemptToPreventCrashes.description: Whether to attempt to prevent Discord crashes.

attemptToNavigateToHome.description: Whether to attempt to navigate to the home when preventing Discord crashes.

ctrlEnterSend.description: Use Ctrl+Enter to send messages (customizable) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

submitRule.description: The way to send a message

sendMessageInTheMiddleOfACodeBlock.description: Whether to send a message in the middle of a code block

customCommands.description: Allows you to create custom slash commands / tags (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

customIdle.description: Allows you to set the time before Discord goes idle (or disable auto-idle) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

idleTimeout.description: Minutes before Discord goes idle (0 to disable auto-idle) (restart required)

remainInIdle.description: When you come back to Discord, remain idle until you confirm you want to go online

CustomRPC.description: Add a fully customisable Rich Presence (Game status) to your Discord profile (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

dearrow.description: Makes YouTube embed titles and thumbnails less sensationalist, powered by Dearrow (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

hideButton.description: Hides the Dearrow button from YouTube embeds (restart required)

replaceElements.description:
Choose which elements of the embed will be replaced (restart required)

Values: 0 = Everything (Titles & Thumbnails), 1 = Titles, 2 = Thumbnails

decor.description: Create and use your own custom avatar decorations, or pick your favorite from the presets. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

disableCallIdle.description: Disables automatically getting kicked from a DM voice call after 3 minutes and being moved to an AFK voice channel. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

disableDeepLinks.description: Disables Discord's stupid deep linking feature which tries to force you to use their Desktop App (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

dontRoundMyTimestamps.description: Always rounds relative timestamps down, so 7.6y becomes 7y instead of 8y (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

expressionCloner.description: Allows you to clone Emotes & Stickers to your own server (right click them) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

f8Break.description: Pause the client when you press F8 with DevTools (+ breakpoints) open. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

fakeNitro.description: Allows you to send fake emojis/stickers, use nitro themes, and stream in nitro quality (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

enableEmojiBypass.description: Allows sending fake emojis (also bypasses missing permission to use custom emojis) (restart required)

emojiSize.description: Size of the emojis when sending

transformEmojis.description: Whether to transform fake emojis into real ones (restart required)

enableStickerBypass.description: Allows sending fake stickers (also bypasses missing permission to use stickers) (restart required)

stickerSize.description: Size of the stickers when sending

transformStickers.description: Whether to transform fake stickers into real ones (restart required)

transformCompoundSentence.description: Whether to transform fake stickers and emojis in compound sentences (sentences with more content than just the fake emoji or sticker link)

enableStreamQualityBypass.description: Allow streaming in nitro quality (restart required)

useStickerHyperLinks.description: Whether to use hyperlinks when sending fake stickers

useEmojiHyperLinks.description: Whether to use hyperlinks when sending fake emojis

hyperLinkText.description: What text the hyperlink should use. {{NAME}} will be replaced with the emoji/sticker name.

disableEmbedPermissionCheck.description: Whether to disable the embed permission check when sending fake emojis and stickers

fakeProfileThemes.description: Allows profile theming by hiding the colors in your bio thanks to invisible 3y3 encoding (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

nitroFirst.description: Default color source if both are present

favoriteGifSearch.description: Adds a search bar to favorite gifs. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

searchOption.description: The part of the url you want to search

fixCodeblockGap.description: Removes the gap between codeblocks and text below it (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

fixImagesQuality.description: Improves quality of images by loading them at their original resolution (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

originalImagesInChat.description: Also load the original image in Chat. WARNING: Read the caveats above

fixSpotifyEmbeds.description: Fixes spotify embeds being incredibly loud by letting you customise the volume (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

volume.description: The volume % to set for spotify embeds. Anything above 10% is veeeery loud

fixYoutubeEmbeds.description: Bypasses youtube videos being blocked from display on Discord (for example by UMG) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

youtubeDescription.description: Adds descriptions to youtube video embeds (restart required)

forceOwnerCrown.description: Force the owner crown next to usernames even if the server is large. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

friendInvites.description: Create and manage friend invite links via slash commands (/create friend invite, /view friend invites, /revoke friend invites). (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

friendsSince.description: Shows when you became friends with someone in the user popout (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

fullSearchContext.description: Makes the message context menu in message search results have all options you'd expect (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

fullUserInChatbox.description: Makes the user mention in the chatbox have more functionalities, like left/right clicking (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

gameActivityToggle.description: Adds a button next to the mic and deafen button to toggle game activity. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

oldIcon.description: Use the old icon style before Discord icon redesign

location.description: Where to show the game activity toggle button

gifPaste.description: Makes picking a gif in the gif picker insert a link into the chatbox instead of instantly sending it (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

greetStickerPicker.description: Allows you to use any greet sticker instead of only the random one by right-clicking the 'Wave to say hi!' button (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

hideMedia.description: Hide attachments and embeds for individual messages via hover button (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

ignoreActivities.description: Ignore activities from showing up on your status ONLY. You can configure which ones are specifically ignored from the Registered Games and Activities tabs, or use the general settings below (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

listMode.description:
Change the mode of the filter list

Values: 0 = Whitelist, 1 = Blacklist

ignorePlaying.description: Ignore all playing activities (These are usually game and RPC activities)

ignoreListening.description: Ignore all listening activities (These are usually spotify activities)

ignoreCompeting.description: Ignore all competing activities (These are normally special game activities)

iLoveSpam.description: Do not hide messages from 'likely spammers' (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

imageFilename.description: Display the file name of images & GIFs as a tooltip when hovering over them (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

showFullUrl.description: Show the full URL of the image instead of just the file name. Always enabled for GIFs because they usually have no meaningful file name

imageLink.description: Never hide image links in messages, even if it's the only content (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

imageZoom.description: Lets you zoom in to images and gifs. Use scroll wheel to zoom in and shift + scroll wheel to increase lens radius / size (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

saveZoomValues.description: Whether to save zoom and lens size values

nearestNeighbour.description: Use Nearest Neighbour Interpolation when scaling images

zoomSpeed.description: How fast the zoom / lens size changes

implicitRelationships.description: Shows your implicit relationships in the Friends tab. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

sortByAffinity.description: Whether to sort implicit relationships by their affinity to you. (restart required)

ircColors.description: Makes username colors in chat unique, like in IRC clients (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

lightness.description: Lightness, in %. Change if the colors are too light or too dark

memberListColors.description: Replace role colors in the member list (restart required)

applyColorOnlyToUsersWithoutColor.description: Apply colors only to users who don't have a predefined color

applyColorOnlyInDms.description: Apply colors only in direct messages; do not apply colors in servers.

keepCurrentChannel.description: Attempt to navigate to the channel you were in before switching accounts or loading Discord. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

LastFMRichPresence.description: Little plugin for Last.fm rich presence (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

apiKey.description: Custom Last.fm API key. Not required but highly recommended to avoid rate limiting with our shared key

clickableLinks.description: Make track, artist and album names clickable links

hideWithSpotify.description: Hide Last.fm presence if spotify is running

hideWithActivity.description: Hide Last.fm presence if you have any other presence

statusDisplayType.description: Show the track / artist name in the member list

nameFormat.description: Show name of song and artist in status name

missingArt.description: When album or album art is missing

showLastFmLogo.description: Show the Last.fm logo by the album cover

loadingQuotes.description: Replace Discords loading quotes (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

replaceEvents.description: Should this plugin also apply during events with special event themed quotes? (e.g. Halloween)

enablePluginPresetQuotes.description: Enable the quotes preset by this plugin

enableDiscordPresetQuotes.description: Enable Discord's preset quotes (including event quotes, during events)

additionalQuotes.description: Additional custom quotes to possibly appear, separated by the below delimiter

memberCount.description: Shows the number of online members, total members, and users in voice channels on the server — in the member list and tooltip. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

toolTip.description: Show member count on the server tooltip (restart required)

memberList.description: Show member count in the member list (restart required)

voiceActivity.description: Show voice activity with member count in the member list

mentionAvatars.description: Shows user avatars and role icons inside mentions (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

showAtSymbol.description: Whether the the @ symbol should be displayed on user mentions

messageLatency.description: Displays an indicator for messages that took ≥n seconds to send (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

latency.description: Threshold in seconds for latency indicator

ignoreSelf.description: Don't add indicator to your own messages

messageLinkEmbeds.description: Adds a preview to messages that link another message (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

messageBackgroundColor.description: Background color for messages in rich embeds

automodEmbeds.description: Use automod embeds instead of rich embeds (smaller but less info)

listMode.description: Whether to use ID list as blacklist or whitelist

idList.description: Guild/channel/user IDs to blacklist or whitelist (separate with comma)

MutualGroupDMs.description: Shows mutual group dms in profiles (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noDefaultHangStatus.description: Disable the default hang status when joining voice channels (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noDevtoolsWarning.description: Disables the 'HOLD UP' banner in the console. As a side effect, also prevents Discord from hiding your token, which prevents random logouts. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noF1.description: Disables F1 help bind. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noMaskedUrlPaste.description: Pasting a link while having text selected will not paste as masked URL (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noMosaic.description: Removes Discord image mosaic (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

inlineVideo.description: Play videos without carousel modal (restart required)

noOnboardingDelay.description: Skips the slow and annoying onboarding delay (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noPendingCount.description: Removes the ping count of incoming friend requests, message requests, and nitro offers. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

hideFriendRequestsCount.description: Hide incoming friend requests count (restart required)

noProfileThemes.description: Completely removes Nitro profile themes from everyone but yourself (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noReplyMention.description: Disables reply pings by default (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

userList.description: List of user ids to allow or exempt pings for (separated by commas or spaces)

roleList.description: List of role ids to allow or exempt pings for (separated by commas or spaces)

inverseShiftReply.description: Invert Discord's shift replying behaviour (enable to make shift reply mention user)

noServerEmojis.description: Do not show server emojis in the autocomplete menu. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

shownEmojis.description: The types of emojis to show in the autocomplete menu.

noSystemBadge.description: Disables the taskbar and system tray unread count badge. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

notificationVolume.description: Save your ears and set a separate volume for notifications and in-app sounds (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noTypingAnimation.description: Disables the CPU-intensive typing dots animation (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noUnblockToJump.description: Allows you to jump to messages of blocked or ignored users and likely spammers without unblocking them (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

openInApp.description: Open links in their respective apps instead of your browser (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

overrideForumDefaults.description: Allows you to override default forum layout/sort order. you can still change it on a per-channel basis (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

defaultLayout.description:
Which layout to use as default

Values: 1 = List, 2 = Gallery

defaultSortOrder.description:
Which sort order to use as default

Values: 0 = Recently Active, 1 = Date Posted

pauseInvitesForever.description: Brings back the option to pause invites indefinitely that stupit Discord removed. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

permissionFreeWill.description: Disables the client-side restrictions for channel permission management. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

lockout.description: Bypass the permission lockout prevention ("Pretty sure you don't want to do this") (restart required)

onboarding.description: Bypass the onboarding requirements ("Making this change will make your server incompatible [...]") (restart required)

permissionsViewer.description: View the permissions a user or channel has, and the roles of a server (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

permissionsSortOrder.description:
The sort method used for defining which role grants an user a certain permission

Values: 0 = Highest Role, 1 = Lowest Role

petpet.description: Adds a /petpet slash command to create headpet gifs from any image (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

pictureInPicture.description: Adds picture in picture to videos (next to the Download button) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

loop.description: Whether to make the PiP video loop or not

PinDMs.description: Allows you to pin private channels to the top of your DM list. To pin/unpin or re-order pins, right click DMs (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

pinOrder.description:
Which order should pinned DMs be displayed in?

Values: 0 = Most recent message, 1 = Custom (right click channels to reorder)

canCollapseDmSection.description: Allow uncategorised DMs section to be collapsable

plainFolderIcon.description: Dont show the small guild icons in folders (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

previewMessage.description: Lets you preview your message before sending it. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

quickMention.description: Adds a quick mention button to the message actions bar (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

quickReply.description: Reply to (ctrl + up/down) and edit (ctrl + shift + up/down) messages via keybinds (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

shouldMention.description:
Ping reply by default

Values: 2 = Follow NoReplyMention plugin (if enabled), 1 = Enabled, 0 = Disabled

ignoreBlockedAndIgnored.description: Ignore messages by blocked/ignored users when navigating

reactErrorDecoder.description: Replaces "Minifed React Error" with the actual error. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

readAllNotificationsButton.description: Read all server notifications with a single button click! (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

relationshipNotifier.description: Notifies you when a friend, group chat, or server removes you. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

notices.description: Also show a notice at the top of your screen when removed (use this if you don't want to miss any notifications).

offlineRemovals.description: Notify you when starting discord if you were removed while offline.

friends.description: Notify when a friend removes you

friendRequestCancels.description: Notify when a friend request is cancelled

servers.description: Notify when removed from a server

groups.description: Notify when removed from a group chat

replaceGoogleSearch.description: Replaces the Google search with different Engine(s) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

customEngineName.description: Name of the custom search engine

replacementEngine.description: Replace with a specific search engine instead of adding a menu

replyTimestamp.description: Shows a timestamp on replied-message previews (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

revealAllSpoilers.description: Reveal all spoilers in a message by Ctrl-clicking a spoiler, or in the chat with Ctrl+Shift-click (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

reverseImageSearch.description: Adds ImageSearch to image context menus (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

roleColorEverywhere.description: Adds the top role color anywhere possible (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

chatMentions.description: Show role colors in chat mentions (including in the message box) (restart required)

memberList.description: Show role colors in member list role headers (restart required)

voiceUsers.description: Show role colors in the voice chat user list (restart required)

reactorsList.description: Show role colors in the reactors list (restart required)

pollResults.description: Show role colors in the poll results (restart required)

colorChatMessages.description: Color chat messages based on the author's role color (restart required)

secretRingToneEnabler.description: Always play the secret version of the discord ringtone (except during special ringtone events) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

onlySnow.description: Only play the Snow Halation Theme (restart required)

sendTimestamps.description: Send timestamps easily via chat box button & text shortcuts. Read the extended description! (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

serverListIndicators.description: Add online friend count or server count in the server list (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

mode.description:
Mode (restart required)

Values: 2 = Only online friend count, 1 = Only server count, 3 = Both server and online friend counts

useCompact.description: Makes the indicator appear with only text (restart required)

shikiCodeblocks.description: Brings vscode-style codeblocks into Discord, powered by Shiki (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

customTheme.description: A link to a custom vscode theme

tryHljs.description: Use the more lightweight default Discord highlighter and theme.

useDevIcon.description: How to show language icons on codeblocks

showAllMessageButtons.description: Always show all message buttons no matter if you are holding the shift key or not. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

noShiftDelete.description: Remove requirement to hold shift for deleting a message.

noShiftPin.description: Remove requirement to hold shift for pinning a message.

showConnections.description: Show connected accounts in user popouts (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

iconSpacing.description:
Icon margin

Values: 0 = Compact, 1 = Cozy, 2 = Roomy

showHiddenThings.description: Displays various hidden & moderator-only things regardless of permissions. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

showTimeoutDuration.description: Shows how much longer a user's timeout will last, either in the timeout icon tooltip or next to it (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

displayStyle.description: How to display the timeout duration

silentMessageToggle.description: Adds a button to the chat bar to toggle sending a silent message. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

persistState.description: How to persist the silent message toggle state

autoDisable.description: Automatically disable the silent message toggle again after sending one

spotifyCrack.description: Free listen along, no auto-pausing in voice chat, and allows activity to continue playing when idling (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

keepSpotifyActivityOnIdle.description: Keep Spotify activity playing when idling (restart required)

spotifyShareCommands.description: Share your current Spotify track, album or artist via slash command (/track, /album, /artist) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

startupTimings.description: Adds Startup Timings to the Settings menu (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

stickerPaste.description: Makes picking a sticker in the sticker picker insert it into the chatbox instead of instantly sending (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

streamerModeOnStream.description: Automatically enables streamer mode when you start streaming in Discord (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

summaries.description: Enables Discord's experimental Summaries feature on every server, displaying AI generated summaries of conversations (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

summaryExpiryThresholdDays.description: The time in days before a summary is removed. Note that only up to 50 summaries are kept per channel

superReactionTweaks.description: Customize the limit of Super Reactions playing at once, and super react by default (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

superReactByDefault.description: Reaction picker will default to Super Reactions

unlimitedSuperReactionPlaying.description: Remove the limit on Super Reactions playing at once

superReactionPlayingLimit.description: Max Super Reactions to play at once. 0 to disable playing Super Reactions

themeAttributes.description: Adds data attributes to various elements for theming purposes (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

translate.description: Translate messages with Google Translate or DeepL (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

receivedInput.description: Language that received messages should be translated from

receivedOutput.description: Language that received messages should be translated to

sentInput.description: Language that your own messages should be translated from

sentOutput.description: Language that your own messages should be translated to

deeplApiKey.example: Get your API key from https://deepl.com/your-account

autoTranslate.description: Automatically translate your messages before sending. You can also shift/right click the translate button to toggle this

showAutoTranslateTooltip.description: Show a tooltip on the ChatBar button whenever a message is automatically translated

unindent.description: Trims leading indentation from codeblocks (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

unlockedAvatarZoom.description: Allows you to zoom in further in the image crop tool when changing your avatar (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

unsuppressEmbeds.description: Allows you to unsuppress embeds in messages (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

userMessagesPronouns.description: Adds pronouns to chat user messages (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

pronounsFormat.description: The format for pronouns to appear in chat

showSelf.description: Enable or disable showing pronouns for yourself

userVoiceShow.description: Shows an indicator when a user is in a Voice Channel (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

showInUserProfileModal.description: Show a user's Voice Channel indicator in their profile next to the name (restart required)

showInMemberList.description: Show a user's Voice Channel indicator in the member and DMs list (restart required)

showInMessages.description: Show a user's Voice Channel indicator in messages (restart required)

USRBG.description: Displays user banners from USRBG, allowing anyone to get a banner without Nitro (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

nitroFirst.description: Banner to use if both Nitro and USRBG banners are present

voiceBackground.description: Use USRBG banners as voice chat backgrounds (restart required)

validReply.description: Fixes "Message could not be loaded" upon hovering over the reply (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

validUser.description: Fix mentions for unknown users showing up as '@unknown-user' (hover over a mention to fix it) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

vcNarrator.description: Announces when users join, leave, or move voice channels via narrator (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

latinOnly.description: Strip non latin characters from names before saying them

viewIcons.description: Makes avatars and banners in user profiles clickable, adds View Icon/Banner entries in the user, server and group channel context menu. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

format.description: Choose the image format to use for non animated images. Animated images will always use .gif

viewRaw.description: Copy and view the raw content/data of any message, channel or guild (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

clickMethod.description: Change the button to view the raw content/data of any message.

voiceChatDoubleClick.description: Join voice chats via double click instead of single click (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

voiceDownload.description: Adds a download to voice messages. (Opens a new browser tab) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

voiceMessages.description: Allows you to send voice messages like on mobile. To do so, right click the upload button and click Send Voice Message. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

volumeBooster.description: Allows you to set the user and stream volume above the default maximum (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

webContextMenus.description: Re-adds context menus missing in the web version of Discord: Links & Images (Copy/Open Link/Image), Text Area (Copy, Cut, Paste, SpellCheck) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

addBack.description: Add back the Discord context menus for images, links and the chat input bar (restart required)

webKeybinds.description: Re-adds keybinds missing in the web version of Discord: ctrl+t, ctrl+shift+t, ctrl+tab, ctrl+shift+tab, ctrl+1-9, ctrl+,. Only works fully on Vesktop/Legcord, not inside your browser (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

webRichPresence.description: Client plugin for arRPC to enable RPC on Discord Web (experimental) (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

webScreenShareFixes.description: Removes 2500kbps bitrate cap on chromium and vesktop clients. (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

XSOverlay.description: Forwards discord notifications to XSOverlay, for easy viewing in VR (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)

preferUDP.description: Enable if you use an older build of XSOverlay unable to connect through websockets. This setting is ignored on web.

youtubeAdblock.description: Block ads in YouTube embeds and the WatchTogether activity via AdGuard (Shared between Vencord and Equicord)
